title: Role Management
emptyDescription: Click "New Role" to add the first role
confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete role "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

sheet.createDescription: Fill in the role information to create a new role

dataScope.label: Data Scope
dataScope.description: Controls which data records this role can view
dataScope.allDesc: Can view all data in the system
dataScope.deptAndSubDesc: Can only view data from own department and its sub-departments
dataScope.deptDesc: Can only view data from own department, excluding sub-departments
dataScope.selfDesc: Can only view data created by themselves
dataScope.customDesc: Manually specify the visible department scope
dataScope.noDeptTree: Org module is not enabled, cannot configure custom scope
